name: Ma Lin
nameEn: MA LIN 路 Penhold Master 路 King of World Cup

tags.text: 馃弳 World Cup Four-time Champion
馃弲 World Singles Runner-up x3

timeline.subtitle: World Championships Breakthrough
achievements: 馃 Eindhoven World Championships Men's Singles Runner-up (lost to Liu Guoliang in final)

timeline.subtitle: First World Cup Title
achievements: 馃弳 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (first major singles title)

timeline.subtitle: World Cup Defense
achievements: 馃弳 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (successful defense)

timeline.subtitle: Athens Olympic Doubles Gold
achievements: 馃 Athens Olympics Men's Doubles Gold (with Chen Qi)
馃弳 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (third title)

timeline.subtitle: World Championships Runner-up Again
achievements: 馃 Shanghai World Championships Men's Singles Runner-up (lost to Wang Liqin in final)

timeline.subtitle: World Cup Four-time Champion
achievements: 馃弳 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (fourth title, tied record)

achievements: 馃 Zagreb World Championships Men's Singles Runner-up (lost to Wang Liqin in final)
馃搶 Three-time World Championships singles runner-up, never won the title

timeline.subtitle: Beijing Olympic Triumph
achievements: 馃 Beijing Olympics Men's Singles Gold (beat Wang Hao 4:1 in final)

timeline.subtitle: Retirement
achievements: 馃搶 Later became coach, served as Guangdong team head coach

achievements.title: 猸?King of World Cup
achievements.description: Ma Lin was the master of penhold technique, winning four World Cup singles titles and earning the title 'King of World Cup'. He reached his career peak by winning men's singles gold at the 2008 Beijing Olympics. Unfortunately, he was a three-time World Championships singles runner-up and never won the title, failing to complete a Grand Slam. Together with Wang Liqin and Wang Hao, they were known as the 'Two Wangs and One Ma'.
